notes: No OpenSCAD/native CAD master exists or was authored this pass. wolfram/musical-saw-wolfram-model.wl (sha256: ef107c5af229e00420eb38e2f3d78fe94190869cd976110a1a2002d7a5bfae5e) models only DIMENSIONLESS control ratios (active-length ratio, bend/torsion control, pitch-gain factors) — no absolute blade length, thickness, or material constants exist anywhere in this repo to parameterize a CAD model from. decision-record.md 'Rejected For L1' explicitly excludes CAD/DXF. Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not applicable until measured blade/safety data exists.
